description_long: This lantern features a tall, slender green post supporting an ornate, twisted metallic arm that cradles a spherical orange lantern. The lantern itself is accented with delicate white flower-like decorations and a small red tassel hanging beneath. The metallic arm has an organic, vine-like appearance, adding a whimsical and decorative touch. The orange globe appears to be the main light enclosure, likely made of colored glass or translucent material. The overall design is reminiscent of East Asian street lanterns, blending both functional and decorative elements. The lantern would be a striking feature in parks, sidewalks, or themed urban areas.
description: A tall, green post-mounted lantern with a twisted metallic arm, orange glass globe, white floral accents, and a red tassel, evoking an East Asian decorative style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the twisted metallic arm, orange globe, white flowers, and red tassel clearly, with the green post centered.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the lantern, with the orange globe and floral accents aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the orange globe and the twisted arm, with the green post and red tassel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the slim profile, with the orange globe and white flowers in a vertical arrangement.
